name: Cottage Cheese Vegetable Casserole
recipeInstructions:
Yield 12 servings - 1/2 C ea. Each serving may be exchanged for: 1 Bread, 1 Low-Fat Meat, Parsley sprigs (optional).
1. Combine carrots, onion and margarine in a non-stick skillet; cook on medium heat until tender.
2. Add mushrooms and cook for an additional 5 minutes. Set aside.
3. In a large bowl, combine the remaining ingredients except parsley.
4. Stir in the cooked vegetables.
5. Turn the mixture into a nonstick 2 quart casserole dish.
6. Cover and bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes or until bubbly.
7. Garnish with parsley before serving, if desired.
